channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Road is really difficult to cycle and drive, 15th May
item.description:
Very bumpy. Lots of potholes and dips which makes driving on it very uncomfortable. Cycling it is dangerous to ones health!
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Grafton Road, Ewens Farm, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: URGENT: Roadworks barriers illegally removed, traffic driving under dangerous hanging tree — Ref: EY102GH19010000041919-01, 15th May
item.description:
Members of the public have illegally removed the road closure barriers adjacent to the A40 and left them to one side. This closure was actively in place for public safety due to an unsafe, hanging tree (Works Reference: EY102GH19010000041919-01), scheduled from 15th May to 19th May. Because the barriers have been displaced, vehicles are now driving directly under the dangerous tree. Please reinstate the closure urgently to prevent a serious accident. To ensure these barriers are not removed illegally again, is it possible to deploy a more secure, heavy-duty, or locked traffic management solution rather than standard plastic barriers.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Whittington Court Lane, Cotswold
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Signs & Barriers left behind by Contractor

item.title: Manhole rattles, 15th May
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 40;42, Orchard Avenue, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Silver Birch Tree has died, 15th May
item.description:
On the shrubbery island in Winton Close, close to a parking laybye behind No. 11 & No.9 Loweswater Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Winton Close, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 25cm wide and 1m long across the rd front of 68Alstone lane, Cheltenham, 15th May
item.description:
It is immediately after turning left from Rowanfield road oppsite to level crossing. It is an old road work across the road from one side to the other on Alstone lane front of 68 Alstone lane. The damage is causing structural vibration in the house when a larger vehicle, bus etc.passing through. This issue is present for at least 6 Months now and getting worst as the damage on the road is detarrieting.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Alstone Lane, Alstone, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
